changelog: Automatic IMAP email ingest now tracks attempts separately from successful runs so failed background runs do not hide future retries
Shared-hosting pseudo-cron now retries email ingest after a short failed-attempt throttle instead of waiting as if ingest completed
The cron endpoint, inline fallback, and CLI maintenance command now store the last email ingest source, result, success time, and error
The admin System background task panel now shows email ingest success, attempts, source, last result, and last error
Background tasks now display as enabled by default when no explicit setting has been saved
